commit_scope: Let deploy settling dispatch one bounded Hostinger deploy rerun for the current main SHA and add an explicit Hostinger API VPS restart surface for SSH transport outages.

local_validation.notes: The focused shell tests prove the Hostinger restart request shape and that settle_public_deploy dispatches one bounded deploy rerun after a failed current-main Hostinger run.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Public deploy is still blocked by Hostinger SSH transport. Current main e1283a7f7c237fd07e156127754b1b7b7b03c000 failed in Hostinger Auto Deploy runs 26890420437, 26890807855, and post-reboot run 26891641642 at Sync tracked deploy script to VPS after eight scp attempts to root@187.77.152.42 timed out. Public health still reports deployed_sha 5dad3d6f0d7f48495b9644fde0e8d26572962ae1.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The deploy settle command observes live main SHA, live deployed SHA, and Hostinger run status together; it dispatches at most one replacement Hostinger deploy for a failed/cancelled current-main run. A human or workflow can restart the VPS through the Hostinger API before another deploy attempt.
test_flows: DEPLOY_SETTLE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=720 DEPLOY_SETTLE_POLL_SECONDS=15 DEPLOY_SETTLE_MAX_DISPATCHES=1 VERIFY_REQUIRE_API_HEALTH_SHA=1 VERIFY_REQUIRE_WEB_HEALTH_PROXY_SHA=1 scripts/settle_public_deploy.sh https://api.coherencycoin.com https://coherencycoin.com
After Hostinger VPS restart: scripts/settle_public_deploy.sh https://api.coherencycoin.com https://coherencycoin.com

phase_gate.reason: The deploy recovery code is locally proven, but production remains behind main until the Hostinger VPS SSH service accepts GitHub-runner SSH/SCP connections and the Hostinger deploy succeeds.

evidence_refs: scripts/settle_public_deploy.sh now dispatches one replacement Hostinger Auto Deploy run for a failed or cancelled current-main run.
scripts/restart_hostinger_vps.sh calls the Hostinger VPS restart API path POST /api/vps/v1/virtual-machines/{virtualMachineId}/restart with bearer-token authorization.
Hostinger Auto Deploy runs 26890420437, 26890807855, and post-reboot run 26891641642 all failed at the same scp timeout gate against 187.77.152.42:22.
